steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject of the verb is frameworks, a plural noun. The list in parentheses gives examples of those frameworks and does not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Use plural agreement
steps.content: A, B, and D are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. The sentence needs a plural verb to describe what the frameworks do for each emotional reaction. The answer is C.
